content: Multi-instance MCP uses ~/.coolify-mcp/instances.json registry mapping friendly names (prod, staging) to URLs/tokens with an active default pointer and optional tool parameter routing. Coolify Cloud API uses identical REST schema under app.coolify.io/api/v1. Local manifest files (.coolify/manifest.json) map local directories to remote resource UUIDs and domains, gitignored to protect environment configs, allowing agents to persist state across sessions.
